description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a complex, multi-gabled dark gray roof and natural wood exterior walls, set on a stone foundation. The structure features several protruding sections, including a prominent front-facing gable with large windows and a covered porch area. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically and asymmetrically arranged across the facades, providing ample natural light. The cabin includes at least two visible exterior doors, one at the front beneath the porch and another on the side, both accessible via small steps. The roof has deep overhangs and is constructed in a traditional gable style, enhancing the cabin's classic, cozy appearance. The overall design suggests a spacious, comfortable residential building suitable for suburban or park-like urban settings.
description: A spacious log cabin with a multi-gabled dark roof, natural wood walls, stone foundation, and multiple windows and doors. Features a covered front porch and traditional rustic architectural style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and large front-facing gable with multiple windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the extended roofline, a side entrance, and fewer windows, with the stone foundation visible.
description_view_2: Angled side view displaying the porch steps, side windows, and the intersection of multiple gabled roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing a secondary gable, additional windows, and the depth of the roof overhangs.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs, constructed in a traditional gable style with dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes, arranged both symmetrically and asymmetrically across all visible facades, with some grouped in pairs and others standalone
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered beneath the front porch gable, and a secondary door on the right side of the building, both accessible by steps
